questions.question: What is the person wearing on their head?
questions.answer_key: A bright pink or magenta colored hat or cap
questions.rationale: Distinctive visual identifier of the person in the scene

questions.question: What animal is the person interacting with?
questions.rationale: Main subject of the action; essential for understanding the scene

questions.question: Where is this scene taking place?
questions.answer_key: At a ranch or farm with wooden fencing and barn buildings
questions.rationale: Setting context crucial for blind listener to visualize the environment

questions.question: What is the person doing with the horse?
questions.answer_key: Riding or mounted on the horse in the fenced area
questions.rationale: Main action in high-need window; core activity blind listener must understand

questions.question: What type of barrier separates the horse area from the surroundings?
questions.answer_key: Wooden ranch-style fencing with horizontal rails
questions.rationale: Key environmental detail that frames the activity space
